revision.text:
[[ja:阿波七福神霊場]] '''{{ill|Awa Seven Lucky Gods Pilgrimage|ja|阿波七福神霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awa Seven Lucky Gods Pilgrimage|qq=}}''' (あわしちふくじんれいじょう) is the sacred site for a pilgrimage tour of the {{ill|Seven Lucky Gods|en|Seven Lucky Gods|qid=Q846858|lt=Seven Lucky Gods|1=Seven Lucky Gods}}, comprised of seven {{ill|temples and shrines|ja|寺社|1=Temples and Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/temples and shrines|13=User:Immanuelle/Temples and Shrines|qq=}}, located within {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}} (formerly {{ill|Awa Province (Tokushima)|en|Awa Province (Tokushima)|qid=Q907457|lt=Awa Province|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}}). == Pilgrimage List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center" |+ Sacred Sites |- ! {{ill|Seven Lucky Gods|en|Seven Lucky Gods|qid=Q846858|lt=Seven Lucky God|1=Seven Lucky Gods}} !! Mountain Name / Temple or Shrine !! Location !! Image |- ! {{ill|Ebisu Taishin|ja|恵比寿太神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebisu Taishin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} || {{ill|Tsunomine Shrine|ja|津峯神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsunomine Shrine|qq=}} || 〒774-0021
{{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}} {{ill|Anan, Tokushima|en|Anan, Tokushima|qid=Q485583|lt=Anan City|1=Anan, Tokushima}}, Tsunomine-cho, Higashibun 343 || [[File:Tsunomine jinja—2013.jpg|150px]] |- ! {{ill|Daikokuten|en|Daikokuten|qid=Q1759916|lt=Daikokuten|1=Daikokuten}} || Nakatsumine-san, {{ill|Nyoirinji|ja|如意輪寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyoirinji|1=Nyoirin-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17213767}} (in {{ill|Tokushima (city)|en|Tokushima (city)|qid=Q207309|lt=Tokushima City|1=Tokushima (city)}}) || 〒771-4264
{{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}} {{ill|Tokushima (city)|en|Tokushima (city)|qid=Q207309|lt=Tokushima City|1=Tokushima (city)}}, Takeracho, Nakatsumine 127 || [[File:Nakatsuminesan Nyoirinji 03.jpg|150px]] |- ! {{ill|Vaiśravaṇa|en|Vaiśravaṇa|qid=Q866315|lt=Bishamonten|1=Vaiśravaṇa}} || Hashiike-san, {{ill|Tateeji|ja|立江寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tateeji|1=Tatsueji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11598032}} (in {{ill|Komatsushima, Tokushima|en|Komatsushima, Tokushima|qid=Q823493|lt=Komatsushima City|1=Komatsushima, Tokushima}}) || 〒773-0017
{{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}} {{ill|Komatsushima, Tokushima|en|Komatsushima, Tokushima|qid=Q823493|lt=Komatsushima City|1=Komatsushima, Tokushima}}, Tatee-cho, Wakamatsu 13 || [[File:Tatsueji 01.JPG|150px]] |- ! {{ill|Benzaiten|ja|弁財天|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benzaiten|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁才天}} || Tenjin-san, {{ill|Kinrinji|ja|金林寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinrinji|1=Konrin-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11647244}} (in {{ill|Anan, Tokushima|en|Anan, Tokushima|qid=Q485583|lt=Anan City|1=Anan, Tokushima}}) || 〒779-1620
{{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}} {{ill|Anan, Tokushima|en|Anan, Tokushima|qid=Q485583|lt=Anan City|1=Anan, Tokushima}}, Fukui-cho, Hamada 106 || |- ! {{ill|Hotei Son|ja|布袋尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hotei Son|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 布袋|1=Budai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q599838}} || {{ill|Sabadaishi Honbō|ja|鯖大師本坊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sabadaishi Honbō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八坂寺 (徳島県海陽町)|1=Yasaka-dera Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11390687}} (in {{ill|Kaihu-gun|ja|海部郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaihu-gun|1=Kaifu District|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11151382}}, Hayato Town) || 〒775-0101
{{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}} {{ill|Kaihu-gun|ja|海部郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaihu-gun|1=Kaifu District|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11151382}} {{ill|Kaiyō, Tokushima|en|Kaiyō, Tokushima|qid=Q1205954|lt=Hayato Town|1=Kaiyō, Tokushima}}, Asakawa Nakaisō 15 || [[File:Sabadaishi 01.JPG|150px]] |- ! {{ill|Jurōjin|en|Jurōjin|qid=Q389611|lt=Jurojin|1=Jurōjin}} || Iōsan, {{ill|Yakōji|ja|薬王寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakōji|1=Yakuōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11622487}} (in Minami Town) || 〒779-2305
{{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}} {{ill|Kaihu-gun|ja|海部郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaihu-gun|1=Kaifu District|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11151382}} {{ill|Minami, Tokushima|en|Minami, Tokushima|qid=Q1351153|lt=Minami Town|1=Minami, Tokushima}}, Okakawachiji-mae 285-1 || [[File:Yakuoji 01.JPG|150px]] |- ! {{ill|Fukurokuju|en|Fukurokuju|qid=Q780797|lt=Fukurokuju|1=Fukurokuju}} || Myōken-san, {{ill|Torusuji|ja|取星寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torusuji|1=Shushō-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11410661}} || 〒779-1106
{{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}} {{ill|Anan, Tokushima|en|Anan, Tokushima|qid=Q485583|lt=Anan City|1=Anan, Tokushima}}, Hanoura-cho, Iwawakai, Matsunomoto 71 || [[File:Shushoji 01.JPG|150px]] |} == Related Articles == * [[日本の寺院一覧]] * [[日本の神社一覧]] * [[朱印 (神社仏閣)]] * [[巡礼]] * {{ill|Seven Lucky Gods|en|Seven Lucky Gods|qid=Q846858|lt=Seven Lucky Gods|1=Seven Lucky Gods}} * {{ill|Tokushima Seven Lucky Gods Pilgrimage|ja|徳島七福神霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokushima Seven Lucky Gods Pilgrimage|1=Tokushima Shichifukujin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11489664}} == External Links == * [http://www.kimura-product.co.jp/sitihuku/awa/awa1.htm#watasi Awa Seven Lucky Gods] * [http://www.awanavi.jp/general.html?keyword=%88%A2%94g%8E%B5%95%9F%90_&do=%2Fsearch&id=344 Awa Seven Lucky Gods – Awa Navi] {{Buddhism-stub|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|阿波七福神霊場|version=102493110|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:阿波七福神霊場]] {{wikidata link|Q11657506}} [[Category:七福神めぐり]] [[Category:Buddhist temples in Tokushima Prefecture]]
